name: Jazz Prep — 30 min
description: ii-V-I vocabulary + all m7 arpeggios + improvisation over a standard. A compact jazz-focused session.

items.label: Warmup — long tones + a mode of the day (5 min)
items.instruction: Pick one mode (start with Dorian). Play it slowly across your range. Focus on tone and connection between notes.

items.label: ii-V-I in 12 keys (12 min)
items.instruction: Cycle through ii-V-I in every key — cycle of 4ths order (Cmaj7 → Fmaj7 → B♭maj7 → E♭maj7 → …). Play the arpeggios for each chord (root - 3rd - 5th - 7th). Metronome around 80-90 BPM. If you have an Arpeggios drill saved for this, launch it.

items.label: Improvise over a standard (10 min)
items.instruction: Pick a jazz standard you know the form of. Play the head; improvise over 3-4 choruses. Focus on using the vocabulary you just drilled.

items.label: Reflect (3 min)
items.instruction: Which ii-V felt hardest during the drill? Which key gave you trouble in the improv? Note them — that's tomorrow's Slow Loop material.
